title: www.drybulkETF.com - February 2, 2021
summary: Capesize rates come "back down to earth"; Expect spot rates to drift on winter lull - Following the best January First half should outperform recent years - 2021 started with a bang, and although there were very particular Volatility in freight should increase - In 2021, we expect demand growth for dry bulk shipping to total almost 3x

- Volatility in freight should increase - In 2021, we expect demand growth for dry bulk shipping to total almost 3x
